mood: compressed neighborhood memory opened as a civic archive cutaway
material_language: pale concrete ledges and utility-block faces
corrugated roof ridges and gutter shadows
black cable, tripod, and lens metal lines
lighting: cool late-morning video glow with darker archive interiors, green shade pressure, and a few restrained red-orange inspection glints
object_inventory: one tall body-scale central void translated into a cutaway chamber
long horizontal roof, street, and skyline bands crossing the section
torn archive seams interrupting clean concrete blocks
small glowing media wells and letter-slot apertures
thin black sightlines, cable conduits, and circular lens holes
negative_constraints: no readable words, labels, filenames, charts, or alphanumeric callouts inside the image
no dashboard, browser chrome, card grid, office desk, shelf archive, cabinet wall, cafe, hotel, garden, or greenhouse scene
do not copy the source image subject, clothing pose, page chrome, logos, or identifiable people
source anchors must be embedded as physical cuts, apertures, seams, ledges, glints, or surface interruptions
keep hover-scale negative space as section air, alley gap, or archive margin rather than blank UI padding
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
